channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-10
item.description:
Our community has seen significant activity across multiple projects, with notable updates in `statcheck`, `docpluck`, `coarse`, `escicheck`, `auto-zcurve`, and `output-it-forward`. The `statcheck` project saw a merge and admin updates in its `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, while `docpluck` addressed documentation and test issues, and applied fixes to its 'glyph' module and rendering. Meanwhile, `coarse` re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker, and `escicheck` synchronized its `main` branch with `escicheckapp` at version `0.6.13`. Additionally, `auto-zcurve` revised its validation note to include a citation, and `output-it-forward` added a Chrome Webstore link. These updates demonstrate the connections and progress being made across our projects, and we celebrate the collaborative efforts of our community members in driving these initiatives forward.

47 commits across 5 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

docpluck20 commits
metacheck18 commits
regcheck6 commits
statcheck2 commits
escicheck1 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed, specifically merging the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch from the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository into itself. The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch also received "admin updates", as stated in the commit message, which is the only other change made in this branch. No other branches were worked on according to the provided commit messages. The commit messages do not provide further details on the nature of the "admin updates". The merge commit suggests that the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was synchronized with its remote counterpart.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 3 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

Work was done on the "staging" branch, where a "small fix" was applied, as stated by Jamie Cummins. The "staging" branch also saw "budget-saving changes", according to Jamie Cummins, which were implemented to reduce costs. Additionally, on the "staging" branch, Jamie Cummins made changes to "improve specificity on 'missing' judgements", updating the handling of such cases. The "staging" branch also received an "update default openai model", which changed the default model used, and "aesthetic bug fixes", which addressed visual issues. Furthermore, the "staging" branch saw an "improve backend handling of insufficient evidence" change, which enhanced how the backend handles cases with insufficient evidence.

3 commit(s) today:

  • 2363d45 [staging] small fix — Jamie Cummins
  • 8277b4d [staging] budget-saving changes — Jamie Cummins
  • f8a0f65 [staging] improve specificity on 'missing' judgements — Jamie Cummins
  • f02456c [staging] update default openai model — Jamie Cummins
  • 90c62a8 [staging] aesthetic bug fixes — Jamie Cummins
  • efb74a8 [staging] improve backend handling of insufficient evidence — Jamie Cummins
  • 1f6986b [staging] remove sign-up — Jamie Cummins
  • 717d756 [staging] user survey improvment — Jamie Cummins
  • 8c5b3bf [staging] additional aesthetic imprvoements — Jamie Cummins
  • adef1de [staging] minor aesthetic improvements — Jamie Cummins
  • a3141f9 [staging] fix quote tracing — Jamie Cummins
  • a8a5cbe [staging] improve report retention — Jamie Cummins
  • d6c7e96 [staging] add multi-file upload — Jamie Cummins
  • 72f7d60 [staging] add advanced error handling and regeneration — Jamie Cummins
  • f0792b4 [staging] add html export for report; various QOL improvements — Jamie Cummins
  • ae1de84 [staging] hardening multi-study extractions — Jamie Cummins
  • 2516dd5 [staging] Update .gitignore — Jamie Cummins
  • d1ee701 [staging] improve report text normalisation — Jamie Cummins
  • fc0bb51 [staging] fix quote pop-ups — Jamie Cummins
  • a8b610a [staging] update quote chunking and UI output — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
